summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-5 through REQ-8) with good coverage. The backend removes the tax field from the Invoice record and createInvoice function, the frontend removes GST/tax from CreateInvoice, InvoiceDetail, and InvoicePrintHeader. However, the hooks file (useQueries.ts) was modified despite being listed as an immutable path constraint, and REQ-8 (Dashboard tax removal) is only mentioned in file summaries without direct diff evidence of the Dashboard page changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the Dashboard page to remove any display of tax-related stats or revenue calculations that previously included GST. Revenue totals shown on the dashboard should reflect subtotals (no tax component).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not include a direct content diff for frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx. Only the file summary mentions fixes to Link navigation but no explicit evidence of tax/GST removal from the Dashboard page is shown in the diff content.

hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists frontend/src/hooks/ as an immutable path that must not be modified. The diff shows this file was modified, removing tax-related mutation parameters from useCreateInvoice.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of a backend migration module (backend/migration.mo)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request any data migration module or migration infrastructure. Adding migration.mo with OldActor/NewActor types and a run function was not requested.
